data.body: Fix landed on main (v1.15.25, commit dd6f44724c). Code change: fetch_jira_changes() now calls get_myself() to determine the service account TZ and converts the buffered UTC datetime to local TZ before formatting the JQL string. The abort guard in bridge-inbound.py that was raising RuntimeError (making the TZ conversion unreachable) has been removed and replaced with a warn-only call. Awaiting live Jira verification before closing. Next step: rewind checkpoint to 2026-04-16T16:13:00Z and re-run process_inbound to recover 7+ days of missed syncs.
